statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

hints.text:
Consider the properties of a Trie data structure.
Ensure that your implementation is consistent with these properties.

editorial.title: Editorial title
editorial.optimalSolution:
Trie search involves traversing the Trie from root to leaf, checking for the presence of a word.
Implement a function that performs this traversal and checks for the presence of the word.
